channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tazara Revitalization Honors Railway Workers and Promotes Regional Development
item.description: The Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority (Tazara) commemorated its 50th anniversary with memorial ceremonies honoring Chinese experts and workers who died during the railway's construction. The event, th...

item.title: Radie Peat Explores 'Two Extremes' of Love in Haunting Solo Single
item.description: Radie Peat, best known as a member of the Irish band Lankum, has released her debut solo single 'Still I Love Him', reworking a traditional love song with close collaborator John Francis Flynn. The tr...

item.title: Sirena Linton reflects on her surprise WWE release and shares her reaction
item.description: Former WWE talent Sirena Linton has spoken publicly about her unexpected release from the company, describing the moment she received the phone call informing her that her contract had been terminated...

item.title: Former Minister Alleges N200m Bribe Demand During Budget Defence

item.title: Systemic Failures in KZN Healthcare Highlighted in Ombud Report
item.description: The health ombud's investigation into the deaths of six healthcare workers in KwaZulu-Natal revealed severe systemic issues across public hospitals. Key findings include chronic staff shortages due to...

item.title: Education System's Failures in Addressing School Safety Concerns
item.description: The Alliance of Concerned Teachers (ACT) has criticized the Department of Education's plan to implement active shooter drills in schools, arguing that such measures alone cannot prevent violence. ACT ...

item.title: France's soccer system reshapes global football talent development
item.description: The article argues that France's successful soccer model, which integrates immigrant talent and prioritizes youth development, should be adopted worldwide. It highlights how players from diverse backg...

item.title: Maharashtra to revoke taxi/auto licenses for drivers failing Marathi language test from August 16
item.description: Maharashtra Transport Minister Pratap Sarnaik announced that taxi and auto-rickshaw drivers who fail to clear a Marathi language test will have their licenses canceled starting August 16. The governme...

item.title: Zanzibar's Infrastructure Projects Boost Economic Growth
item.description: Zanzibar is witnessing significant infrastructure development as major projects on Unguja and Pemba islands near completion. Government officials highlight the transformative impact of these initiativ...

item.title: ASIC probes big four accounting firms' handling of internal complaints after KPMG data misuse scandal

item.title: De La Salle Lipa Suspends Face-to-Face Classes for One Week Following Reported Security Threat
item.description: De La Salle Lipa in Batangas temporarily shifted all classes to online learning from July 6 to 11 after an alleged mass shooting threat circulated on social media. According to reports, parents receiv...

item.title: Trump Seeks Supreme Court Rehearing on Birthright Citizenship Ruling
item.description: President Donald Trump has demanded that the U.S. Supreme Court reconsider its 2025 ruling upholding birthright citizenship for children of undocumented immigrants, a decision the justices have never ...

item.title: India's indigenous 19-seater Saras MkII light transport aircraft design completes, minister hails as aviation milestone

item.title: Justin Bieber and Global Artists to Perform at World Cup Final Halftime Show
item.description: FIFA has announced that Justin Bieber will headline the World Cup final halftime show, joining fellow performers Madonna, Shakira, and BTS. The 11-minute performance, curated by Coldplay’s Chris Marti...

item.title: How to Maximize Earnings from Apple Gift Cards in Nigeria 2026
item.description: This article explains how Nigerians can convert Apple Gift Cards into Naira by understanding current exchange rates and market trends. It highlights that the value of these cards fluctuates based on f...

item.title: Over 50,000 Immigrants Repatriated from South Africa Amid Xenophobia Crisis
item.description: Over 50,000 immigrants have fled South Africa since xenophobic violence erupted last month, according to the Border Management Authority. Most have passed through a temporary repatriation center near ...

item.title: Aunty Ruth Simms: 50 Years of Educating and Inspiring Indigenous Students in NSW
item.description: Aunty Ruth Simms, the longest-serving Aboriginal Education Officer in New South Wales, has dedicated 50 years to transforming lives through education. Born and raised on La Perouse Reserve, she recall...
